DashboardNotes

Gaussian Splat Model Capability Dashboard

Static report generated from local 5-frame and 10-frame test outputs. NetworkX lays out the model capability graph; W&B run IDs and result artifacts come from the frame-test runs.

ReSplat COLMAP

feed-forward Gaussian splatting

Inputs
COLMAP scene, sparse cameras, images_4/images_8 frames
Outputs
Rendered target views, Gaussian scene representation, PSNR/SSIM/LPIPS
  • COLMAP ingestion
  • multi-view context selection
  • target-view rendering
  • image metrics
5f: 660n94vb10f: y2v39r51

MVSplat RE10K

cost-volume Gaussian splatting

Inputs
RE10K torch chunks and sampled context/target views
Outputs
Rendered target views, scores JSON, benchmark JSON, W&B result artifact
  • chunk dataset evaluation
  • cost-volume depth candidates
  • target-view rendering
  • image metrics
5f: 0snhsgd510f: h2al9i2r

AnySplat Image Folder

image-folder Gaussian reconstruction

Inputs
Flat directory of 5 or 10 source images
Outputs
Predicted camera poses, Gaussian statistics, manifest artifact
  • unordered image-folder inference
  • pose prediction
  • Gaussian attribute export
  • source preview logging
5f: ajzxkwuk10f: spp9h258
